summary: Frontend testing completed for TRUCKER-NAV-By-TUE bug fixes. All 3 reported issues verified as FIXED: (1) Satellite map now shows actual aerial photographs with explore.satellite.day style, (2) Distance units now use miles/feet/quarter mile/half a mile instead of meters, (3) Traffic light throttling implemented with MIN_TRAFFIC_ALERT_GAP. All 11 requested features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: hereMapUtils.ts line 35 - Satellite tiles use style=explore.satellite.day&features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive&ppi=100 - actual aerial photos now visible
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 143-170 - convertInstructionToImperial function correctly converts meters/km to miles/feet/quarter mile/half a mile
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 3649-3659 - MIN_TRAFFIC_ALERT_GAP throttles traffic light alerts to ~0.3 miles apart minimum
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx lines 34-38 - formatDistance function uses miles (mi) and feet (ft) units
VERIFIED: Voice announcements use natural language: 'In 0.2 miles', 'Go for quarter mile', 'Speed limit 35 miles per hour'

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button - no credentials needed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported bugs verified as FIXED: (1) Satellite imagery now shows actual aerial photos using explore.satellite.day style, (2) Distance units converted to imperial (miles/feet/quarter mile/half a mile), (3) Traffic light alerts throttled with MIN_TRAFFIC_ALERT_GAP. Test flow: Guest login -> Skip onboarding -> Navigation -> Search 'Dallas, TX' -> Click Route -> Route Comparison shows 3 routes -> START NAV -> Navigation active. Known pre-existing issues: Gemini TTS 403 (falls back to native), geolocation denied in preview (uses IP fallback).

guest_login.details: Guest login works, navigates to Dashboard, then Navigation view

satellite_map_imagery.details: Satellite map shows ACTUAL aerial photographs of terrain, buildings, trees - NOT just colored road lines. explore.satellite.day style working correctly with ppi=100

vehicle_restriction_icons.details: Restriction icons (no-truck signs) properly sized with ppi=100 parameter

navigation_hud_imperial_units.details: HUD shows '1312 FT' (feet), voice says 'In 0.2 miles', 'Go for quarter mile', 'Speed limit 35 miles per hour' - NO meters

route_calculation_3_alternatives.details: Route comparison shows 3 routes: PRIMARY (661.0 mi, 9h 37m), ALT 1 (674.4 mi, 10h 25m), ALT 2 (694.4 mi, 10h 29m)

start_nav_button.details: START NAV button works without crash, navigation starts successfully

navigation_hud_theme.details: NavigationHUD shows with BLACK background (bg-black/95) and GOLD (#D4AF37) direction arrow

speed_limit_sign.details: Speed limit sign visible during navigation, voice announces 'Speed limit 35 miles per hour'

bottom_trip_bar.details: Shows W BROADWAY GO, distance 661.0 mi, time 9h 37m, ETA 6:31 AM, state indicator IOWA

poi_panel_branded_truck_stops.details: Shows TA Travel Center, Pilot Flying J, Pilot, Love's Travel Stop with distances in miles

no_error_boundary.details: No 'Something went wrong' error boundary appeared during entire flow

satellite_map_not_rendering.before: Map showed colored road lines on dark background (logistics.satellite.day with ppi=400/72)
satellite_map_not_rendering.after: Map shows actual satellite/aerial photographs (explore.satellite.day with ppi=100)

distance_in_meters_instead_of_miles.after: Distance shown in miles/feet (e.g., '1312 ft', 'quarter mile', 'half a mile', '5 miles')

traffic_lights_repeating_too_many_times.before: Traffic light alerts fired at every occurrence
traffic_lights_repeating_too_many_times.after: Traffic light alerts throttled with MIN_TRAFFIC_ALERT_GAP (~0.3 miles apart minimum)

known_issues.gemini_tts_api: 403 error - API key reported as leaked. Falls back to native browser TTS. Pre-existing issue.
known_issues.geolocation: User denied Geolocation in preview environment. Uses IP fallback (Council Bluffs, Iowa). Expected behavior.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live

console_log_evidence.imperial_units_voice: Speech Service: Queuing 'Starting route to Dallas. In 0.2 miles, Head toward S 8th St on W Broadway. Go for quarter mile.'
console_log_evidence.speed_limit_voice: Speech Service: Queuing 'Speed limit 35 miles per hour.'
console_log_evidence.route_calculation: Frontend: Decoded 7649 points for route 0 (1 section), Processed 7649 coordinates
